poems.cn: 你呼吸的此刻，阿塔卡马的星空正越过地心，与你遥遥对望。
poems.en: As you breathe, the stars of Atacama gaze across the earth's core, meeting you from afar.

poems.cn: 百年无雨的沙漠风，正吹过地球的另一端。
poems.en: A century of dry desert wind blows across the far side of the planet.

poems.cn: 银河垂在旱极上空，和你头顶的夜空遥遥相应。
poems.en: The Milky Way hangs low over the driest place on earth, echoing the night sky above you.

poems.cn: 这一刻，你与安第斯山麓的葡萄园，正隔着地心同频呼吸。
poems.en: In this moment, you breathe in sync with the Andean vineyards, across the core of the earth.

poems.cn: 雪水顺着山坳淌进山谷，滋养着地球背面的每一颗葡萄。
poems.en: Snowmelt runs down the mountain slopes, feeding every grape on the far side of the world.

poems.cn: 瓦尔帕莱索的海浪声，正和你耳边的风遥遥相应。
poems.en: The sound of waves in Valparaíso echoes the wind at your ear.

poems.cn: 你站在原地的此刻，巴塔哥尼亚的冰川正静默着，与你共享同一段时光。
poems.en: As you stand where you are, the Patagonian glaciers lie silent, sharing this same moment with you.

poems.cn: 南极来的寒流穿过峡湾，游过地球另一端的深海。
poems.en: The cold Antarctic current winds through the fjords, cutting through the deep sea on the far side.

poems.cn: 冰川碎裂的轻响，顺着风漫过世界的尽头。
poems.en: The faint crack of glacial ice drifts on the wind, across the edge of the world.

pampas.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯 / 潘帕斯草原

poems.cn: 这一刻，你与潘帕斯的野草，正隔着整个地球同频晃动。
poems.en: In this moment, you sway in sync with the Pampas grass, across the entire planet.

poems.cn: 博尔赫斯笔下的月光，正落在地球另一端的街角。
poems.en: The moonlight in Borges' words falls on a street corner on the far side of the earth.

poems.cn: 烤肉的香气混着探戈声，漫过整片草原的黄昏。
poems.en: The scent of asado mixes with tango music, drifting across the dusk of the whole plain.

mendoza.name: 门多萨 / 安第斯山麓

poems.cn: 你举杯的瞬间，门多萨的葡萄正晒着高海拔的太阳，与你共享同一份日光。
poems.en: The moment you raise your glass, Mendoza's grapes soak up high-altitude sun, sharing the same daylight with you.

poems.cn: 安第斯的融雪顺着沟渠流进葡萄园，凉丝丝地漫过地球背面。
poems.en: Andean snowmelt trickles through ditches into the vineyards, cool and crisp across the far side.

poems.cn: 每一颗马尔贝克里，都藏着雪山的影子和高原的风。
poems.en: Every Malbec grape holds the shadow of snow peaks and the wind of the high plains.

poems.cn: 你裹紧外套的此刻，巴塔哥尼亚的荒原风正掠过雪山，与你遥遥同凉。
poems.en: As you pull your coat tighter, the Patagonian steppe wind sweeps past the snow peaks, sharing the same chill with you from afar.

poems.cn: 雪山脚下的小镇里，热巧克力的甜香飘在空气里。
poems.en: In the town below the peaks, the sweet smell of hot chocolate hangs in the air.

poems.cn: 冷水鱼游过澄澈的湖面，倒影里是终年不化的雪。
poems.en: Cold-water fish glide across clear lakes, snow-capped peaks mirrored on the surface.

poems.cn: 你望向远处的此刻，南太平洋的浪正一起一落，与你同频呼吸。
poems.en: As you gaze into the distance, the South Pacific waves rise and fall, breathing in sync with you.

poems.cn: 一场没人看见的雨落在洋面，连回声都消散在风里。
poems.en: An unseen rain falls on the ocean, even its echo lost in the wind.

poems.cn: 洋流推着浪走了上万里，从没碰过一寸陆地。
poems.en: Currents carry waves for thousands of miles, never touching a single shore.

poems.cn: 你听着风的此刻，南大西洋的海浪正缓缓起伏，与你隔着地心同频。
poems.en: As you listen to the wind, the South Atlantic waves roll slow, in sync with you across the earth's core.

poems.cn: 鲸鱼的长歌穿过远洋，慢慢飘向地球的另一端。
poems.en: The long song of whales travels across the open ocean, drifting toward the far side of the earth.

poems.cn: 海风带着咸意，越过潘帕斯的尽头吹向内陆。
poems.en: The sea breeze carries salt, drifting inland past the edge of the Pampas.
